# Syllabus Content

**ME1-12-02** operates with 2D and 3D vectors and uses 2D vectors to
solve problems involving motion in two dimensions

**Vector representation and notation**

- Define a vector as a quantity having both magnitude and direction

- Associate vectors with directed line segments and recognise that a
  vector may have many directed line segments associated with it

- Identify and use notation for vectors in both two dimensions and three
  dimensions, including $\mathbf{a}$, $\underset{\sim}{a}$ and
  $\overrightarrow{AB}$, where $\overrightarrow{AB}$ is the vector with
  magnitude and direction those of the directed line segment from $A$ to
  $B$

- Use notations $\left| \mathbf{a} \right|$,
  $\left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right|$ and
  $\left| \overrightarrow{AB} \right|$ to represent the magnitude of a
  vector

- Describe a position vector as a vector with its tail at the origin

- Represent vectors graphically with and without graphing applications

- Recognise and use the fact that two vectors are equal if they have the
  same magnitude and direction to solve problems

**Introduction to 2D vectors**

- Use Cartesian coordinates to represent points in 2-dimensional (2D)
  and 3-dimensional (3D) space with and without graphing applications

- Use the midpoint and distance formulas in two dimensions and three
  dimensions

- Identify that, in three dimensions, all points on the $xy$-plane have
  a $z$-coordinate of 0, and deduce similar properties for points on the
  $xz$ and $yz$-planes and thus the equations of the three coordinate
  planes

- Define the zero vector $\mathbf{0}$, written as $\underset{\sim}{0}$,
  as the vector with zero magnitude and no direction

- Define unit vectors as vectors of magnitude 1

- Recognise and use $\widehat{\mathbf{a}}$ and
  $\widehat{\underset{\sim}{a}}$ as the notation for the unit vector in
  the direction of $\mathbf{a}$

- Define the standard perpendicular unit vectors $\mathbf{i}$ and
  $\mathbf{j}$ in two dimensions and $\mathbf{i}$, $\mathbf{j}$ and
  $\mathbf{k}$ in three dimensions

- Express 2D vectors in component form, $x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j}$; as
  an ordered pair, $(x,y)$; and in column vector notation
  $\begin{pmatrix}
  x \\
  y
  \end{pmatrix}$

- Recognise $\overrightarrow{AB} = \begin{pmatrix}
  u - x \\
  v - y
  \end{pmatrix}$ as the vector associated with the directed line segment
  from the point $A(x,y)$ to $B(u,v)$ in two dimensions

- Express 3D vectors in component form,
  $x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j} + z\mathbf{k}$; as an ordered triple,
  $(x,y,z)$; and in column vector notation $\begin{pmatrix}
  x \\
  y \\
  z
  \end{pmatrix}$

- Recognise $\overrightarrow{AB} = \begin{pmatrix}
  u - x \\
  v - y \\
  w - z
  \end{pmatrix}$ as the vector associated with the directed line segment
  from $A(x,y,z)$ to $B(u,v,w)$ in three dimensions

**Operating with vectors**

- Define a scalar as a real number that is used to multiply a vector

- Represent geometrically a scalar multiple of a vector in two
  dimensions and three dimensions with and without graphing applications

- Perform multiplication of a vector by a scalar algebraically in
  component form

- Establish and identify $\mathbf{a} = k\mathbf{b}$, for a non-zero
  scalar $k$, as a condition for two non-zero vectors $\mathbf{a}$ and
  $\mathbf{b}$ to be parallel to each other and determine with
  justification if two vectors are parallel to one another

- Identify $\begin{pmatrix}
  b \\
   - a
  \end{pmatrix}$ and $\begin{pmatrix}
   - b \\
  a
  \end{pmatrix}$ as vectors perpendicular to $\begin{pmatrix}
  a \\
  b
  \end{pmatrix}$ and with equal magnitude

- Perform addition and subtraction of vectors algebraically in component
  form, and verify, with and without graphing applications, that
  geometrically these are obtained using the triangle law or the
  parallelogram law

- Establish and calculate the magnitude of a vector using
  $\left| x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j} \right| = \sqrt{x^{2} + y^{2}}$ for
  2D vectors and
  $\left| x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j} + z\mathbf{k} \right| = \sqrt{x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2}}$
  for 3D vectors

- Use the magnitude of a vector to find the unit vector
  $\widehat{\mathbf{a}} = \frac{1}{\left| \mathbf{a} \right|}\mathbf{a}$
  in two dimensions and three dimensions

# Introduction to Vectors

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Vectors**                                                     |
+===================================================================+
| A **scalar** quantity has only size, or **magnitude**.\           |
| E.g. Distance of school from home is 3 km.\                       |
| Speed of a plane is 800 km/h.\                                    |
| Temperature, length, area, ...                                    |
|                                                                   |
| A **vector** quantity has **magnitude** and **direction**.\       |
| E.g. Displacement of school from home is 3 km at a bearing of     |
| 120°.\                                                            |
| Velocity of a plane is 800 km/h at a bearing of 225°.\            |
| Acceleration, force, weight, ...                                  |
|                                                                   |
| A vector quantity is often used to represent movement or change.  |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Geometric Representation of Vectors**                         |
+===================================================================+
| We represent vector quantities using a **straight arrow**         |
| pointing in **one direction**.                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** Vectors                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Geometric Representation of Vectors**                         |
+===================================================================+
| The **length** of the line represents the **magnitude** of a      |
| quantity.                                                         |
|                                                                   |
| The **arrowhead** represents the **direction** of a quantity.     |
|                                                                   |
| E.g.                                                              |
|                                                                   |
| 3 m North 6 m North-East                                          |
|                                                                   |
| Two vectors are **equal** if they have the **same** **magnitude** |
| **and** **direction**.                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Vector Variable Notation**                                                                                                            |
+===========================================================================================================================================+
| Instead of an arrow, we can use algebraic notation to represent both magnitude and direction.                                             |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| We can communicate the following vector quantity in these ways:                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| ![A black line with letters and a letter AI-generated content may be                                                                      |
| incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image4.png){width="1.0280905511811023in" |
| height="1.0444674103237095in"}                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| Magnitude & direction: 3 cm northeast OR\                                                                                                 |
| 3 cm at $45{^\circ}$ to horizontal\                                                                                                       |
| \                                                                                                                                         |
| Variable notation: $\overset{̰}{a}$, $\mathbf{a}$, or $\overrightarrow{a}$                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| - This booklet will consistently use $\overset{̰}{a}$.                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| - It is **not** possible to add nor subtract scalars with vectors.\                                                                       |
|   It **is** possible to multiply scalars and vectors.                                                                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** vector notation                                                                                          |
+=======================+====================================+===========================+=================================+
| Which of the following represent vectors?                                                                                |
+-----------------------+------------------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| a.                    | b.                                 | c.                        | d.                              |
|                       |                                    |                           |                                 |
| $$5a + b$$            | $$5\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$$ | $$- \overset{̰}{c}$$       | $$3(\mathbf{d} + 2\mathbf{e})$$ |
+-----------------------+------------------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| e.                    | f.                                 | g.                        | h.                              |
|                       |                                    |                           |                                 |
| $$\overset{̰}{f} + 1$$ | $$\frac{\overrightarrow{a}}{5}$$   | $$\frac{2}{3}\mathbf{a}$$ | $$7 - \mathbf{j}$$              |
+-----------------------+------------------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------------------+

| a.  Sarah walks 4 km North, then 3 km North.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | b.  Sarah walks 4 km North, then 3 km South.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | c.  Sarah walks 5 km North, then 12 km East.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Tip and Tail**                                                                                                               |
+==================================================================================================================================+
| A vector **starts** at the **tail** and **ends** at the **tip**.                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                  |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image5.png){width="1.347594050743657in" |
| height="0.6974737532808399in"}                                                                                                   |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** tip and tail of a vector.                                                                                                  |
+==================================+==================================+==================================+==================================+
| a.                               | b.                               | c.                               | d.                               |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| Two vectors are connected **tip to tail** when you draw the second vector starting from where the first vector ends.                      |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| Which of the following shows vectors connected **tip** to **tail**?                                                                       |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| a.                               | b.                               | c.                               | d.                               |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| e.                               | f.                               | g.                               | h.                               |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| - **Vector Addition (Same Vector)**                                                                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| To add vectors, connect them **tip to tail**.\                                                                                            |
| Wherever you stop drawing one vector, you start drawing the next.\                                                                        |
| The **resultant vector** connects the tail of the first vector to the tip of the final vector.                                            |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image6.png){width="2.107305336832896in"          |
| height="0.7354286964129484in"}                                                                                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** vector addition (same vector)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

| For the vectors given below, sketch the resultant vector on the grid:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{p} + \overset{̰}{p} + \overset{̰}{p}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | b.  $2\overset{̰}{q}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | c.  $\overset{̰}{r} + \overset{̰}{r} + \overset{̰}{r} + \overset{̰}{r}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Negative Vectors**                                                                                               |
+======================================================================================================================+
| To make a vector negative, reverse the direction of the arrow.                                                       |
|                                                                                                                      |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image7.png){width="1.125in" |
| height="0.7366896325459318in"}                                                                                       |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** negative vectors                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

| For the vectors given below, sketch on the grid:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $- \overset{̰}{p}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | b.  $- \overset{̰}{q} + \left( - \overset{̰}{q} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | c.  $- 3\overset{̰}{r}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Scalar Multiplication**                                                                                                       |
+===================================================================================================================================+
| **Scalar multiplication** multiplies a vector by a constant factor $\lambda\  \in \ \mathbb{R}$ (called a **scalar**).            |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| Scalar multiplication **changes the** **magnitude** (length) of the vector.                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image8.png){width="2.8548458005249344in" |
| height="1.6698687664041996in"}                                                                                                    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** scalar multiplication of a vector                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

| For the vectors given below, sketch on the grid:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $2\overset{̰}{p}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | b.  $2.5\overset{̰}{q}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | c.  $\frac{3}{2}\overset{̰}{r}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

| d.  $- \frac{7}{2}\overset{̰}{a}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | e.  $- 4\overset{̰}{b}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| - **Vector Addition**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| To add vectors, connect them **tip to tail**.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| The **resultant vector** connects the tail of the first vector to the tip of the final vector.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| For vector **subtraction**, **add the negative**.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image9.png){width="1.976878827646544in" height="1.2986111111111112in"}![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image10.png){width="2.0348403324584425in" height="0.9612193788276465in"}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| - Vector addition is **commutative**. You can add in any order: $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b} = \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{a}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** vector addition                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

| For the vectors given below, sketch on the grid:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{p} + \overset{̰}{q}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | b.  $\overset{̰}{q} + \overset{̰}{p}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | c.  $2\overset{̰}{p} + \overset{̰}{q}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | d.  $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{c}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
