|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Vector Subtraction**                                                                                                                                         |
+==================================================================================================================================================================+
| To add vectors, connect them **tip to tail**.\                                                                                                                   |
| The **resultant vector** connects the tail of the first vector to the tip of the final vector.                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| For vector **subtraction**, **add the negative**.                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| $$\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b} = \overset{̰}{a} + \left( - \overset{̰}{b} \right)$$                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image9.png){width="1.5024004811898513in"                                |
| height="1.2982895888013999in"}![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image10.png){width="2.0348403324584425in" |
| height="0.9612193788276465in"}                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| - Vector addition is **commutative**. You can add in any order: $\overset{̰}{a} + \left( - \overset{̰}{b} \right) = - \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{a}$               |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| - Vector subtraction is **not commutative**. $\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b} \neq \overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a}$                                                  |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** vector subtraction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

| For the vectors given below, sketch on the grid:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{p} - \overset{̰}{q}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | b.  $\overset{̰}{q} - \overset{̰}{p}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | c.  $\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{c}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | d.  $\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{a}$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Zero Vector**                                                                          |
+============================================================================================+
| A **zero vector** $\overset{̰}{\mathbf{0}}$ has **zero magnitude** and **no direction**.    |
|                                                                                            |
| A zero vector appears as a point, but it does not indicate a position.                     |
|                                                                                            |
| $$0\overset{̰}{a} = \overset{̰}{0};\ \ \ \ \ \overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{a} = \overset{̰}{0}$$ |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Foundation

1.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image11.png){width="2.3622047244094486in"
    height="2.392201443569554in"}On the grid, some parallel vectors are
    shown. Name each vector in terms of $\overset{̰}{v}$.

From the top left to bottom right:

$$- \frac{1}{4}\overset{̰}{v}$$

$$\frac{1}{2}\overset{̰}{v}$$

$$- \frac{3}{4}\overset{̰}{v}$$

$$- \overset{̰}{v}$$

$$2\overset{̰}{v}$$

$$\frac{1}{2}\overset{̰}{v}$$

$$\frac{1}{4}\overset{̰}{v}$$

    $\underset{\sim}{b}$, draw:

|                      | a.  $\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b}$ | b.  $\underset{\sim}{a} - \underset{\sim}{b}$ |

|                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                        |

| d.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image18.png){width="1.9916262029746281in" | e.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image18.png){width="2.2971008311461065in" |                                                                                                                                        |

|                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                        |
| $\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b}$ or $\overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{a}$                                                           | $\underset{\sim}{b} - \underset{\sim}{a}$ or $- \overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$                                                         |                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

    a.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image19.png){width="3.8188976377952755in"
        height="2.8655916447944008in"}$- \overset{̰}{p}$

$$\overset{̰}{f}$$

$$\overset{̰}{d}$$

$$\overset{̰}{h}$$

d.  $\overset{̰}{q}$ + $\overset{̰}{r}$

$$\overset{̰}{b}$$

e.  $- \overset{̰}{p}\  - \ \overset{̰}{r}$

$$\overset{̰}{c}$$

f.  $- \overset{̰}{q}\  + \ \overset{̰}{r}$

$$\overset{̰}{a}$$

g.  $p\ ̰\  + \ q\ ̰\  + \ r\ ̰$

$$\overset{̰}{e}$$

h.  $\overset{̰}{p}\  - \ \overset{̰}{q}\  + \ \overset{̰}{r}$

$$\overset{̰}{g}$$

# Column Vector Notation

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Investigation** vector components.                                                                                            |
+===================================================================================================================================+
| Every vector has a **horizontal component** and a **vertical component**.                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| This is the reverse process of vector addition, where we decompose a single vector into two perpendicular parts.                  |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image20.png){width="5.664429133858268in" |
| height="1.6401126421697287in"}                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| We can then describe this vector using **column vector notation**:                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $$\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                         |
| 5 \\                                                                                                                              |
| 3                                                                                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)$$                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| For $\left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                      |
| 5 \\                                                                                                                              |
| 3                                                                                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)$, $5$ means to move 5 units ............ from tail to tip.                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $3$ means to move 3 units ............ from tail to tip.                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| Express the following vectors in column notation:                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image21.png){width="3.013423009623797in" |
| height="3.0556485126859143in"} $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                           |
|  \\                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $\overset{̰}{b} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                          |
|  \\                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $\overset{̰}{c} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                          |
|  \\                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $\overset{̰}{d} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                          |
|  \\                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $\overset{̰}{e} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                          |
|  \\                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Column Vector Notation**                                                                                                       |
+====================================================================================================================================+
| Every vector has a **horizontal component** and a **vertical component**.                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                    |
| We express this using **column vector notation.**                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                    |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image22.png){width="1.7025962379702537in" |
| height="1.1040726159230096in"}                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    |
| $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                           |
| x \\                                                                                                                               |
| y                                                                                                                                  |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                    |
| Positive means right / up.                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                    |
| Negative means left / down.                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                    |
| - It is also valid to write a vector as an ordered pair $(x,y)$,\                                                                  |
|   but this might be confused for a point, so will be avoided in this booklet.                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** column vector notation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

| For the vectors given below, sketch on the grid:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | b.  $\overset{̰}{b} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | c.  $\overset{̰}{c} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | d.  $\overset{̰}{d} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|     3 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     5 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     5 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |      - 5 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|     5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |     3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |      - 3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |      - 3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| e.  $\overset{̰}{e} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | f.  $\overset{̰}{f} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | g.  $\overset{̰}{g} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | h.  $\overset{̰}{h} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|     0 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     5 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |      - 5 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |      - 2 \\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|     5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |     0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |     0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |     4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Investigation** vector arithmetic using column vectors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

| Vectors can be represented in two ways: as geometric arrows or as algebraic columns.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| The algebraic form makes calculations easier.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Find $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$ and $\overset{̰}{c} + \overset{̰}{d}$ using geometric vector addition below:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
