|      - 2                                            |     6                                               | $$\ \left( \begin{array}{r}                          |
|     \end{array} \right)$                            |     \end{array} \right)$                            | 15 \\                                                |
|                                                     |                                                     | 20                                                   |
| $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                           | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                           | \end{array} \right)$$                                |
|  - 8 \\                                             | 3 \\                                                |                                                      |
|  - 3                                                |  - 11                                               |                                                      |
| \end{array} \right)$$                               | \end{array} \right)$$                               |                                                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------+
| g.  $- 3\left( \begin{array}{r}                     | h.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}                        | i.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}                         |
|     6 \\                                            |     2 \\                                            |      - 1 \\                                          |
|      - 2                                            |     1                                               |      - 2                                             |
|     \end{array} \right)$                            |     \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r} |     \end{array} \right) + \ 2\left( \begin{array}{r} |
|                                                     |      - 1 \\                                         |     2 \\                                             |
| $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                           |      - 3                                            |      - 3                                             |
|  - 18 \\                                            |     \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r} |     \end{array} \right) - \ \left( \begin{array}{r}  |
| 6                                                   |     4 \\                                            |     1 \\                                             |
| \end{array} \right)$$                               |      - 5                                            |     1                                                |
|                                                     |     \end{array} \right)$                            |     \end{array} \right)$                             |
|                                                     |                                                     |                                                      |
|                                                     | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                           | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                            |
|                                                     | 5 \\                                                | 2 \\                                                 |
|                                                     |  - 7                                                |  - 9                                                 |
|                                                     | \end{array} \right)$$                               | \end{array} \right)$$                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------+

2.  The resultant vector is $\left( \begin{array}{r}
     - 2 \\
    5
    \end{array} \right)$ when adding vectors $\left( \begin{array}{r}
    a \\
    3
    \end{array} \right)$ and $\left( \begin{array}{r}
     - 5 \\
    b
    \end{array} \right).$ Find the values of $a$ and $b$.

$$a\  = \ 3,\ b\  = \ 2\ $$

3.  The resultant vector of $- 3\left( \begin{array}{r}
    x \\
    y
    \end{array} \right)$ is $\left( \begin{array}{r}
     - 12 \\
    39
    \end{array} \right).$ Evaluate $x$ and $y$.

$$x\  = \ 4,\ y\  = \  - 13$$

4.  The resultant vector of $4\left( \begin{array}{r}
    p \\
     - 2
    \end{array} \right) - \ 3\left( \begin{array}{r}
    2 \\
    q
    \end{array} \right)$ is $\left( \begin{array}{r}
    14 \\
     - 8
    \end{array} \right).$ Evaluate $p$ and $q$.

$$p\  = \ 5,\ q\  = \ 0$$

5.  Given that $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    2 \\
     - 2
    \end{array} \right),\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
     - 3 \\
     - 5
    \end{array} \right)$ and
    $\underset{\sim}{c} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    24 \\
    8
    \end{array} \right)$,\
    find the values of $\lambda ₁$ and $\lambda ₂$ such that
    $\underset{\sim}{c}\  = \lambda_{1}\underset{\sim}{a}\  + \lambda_{2}\underset{\sim}{b}.$

$${\underset{\sim}{c} = \lambda_{1}\underset{\sim}{a} + \lambda_{2}\underset{\sim}{b}\ 
}{\left( \begin{array}{r}
24 \\
8
\end{array} \right) = \ \lambda_{1}\left( \begin{array}{r}
2 \\
 - 2
\end{array} \right) + \ \lambda_{2}\left( \begin{array}{r}
 - 3 \\
 - 5
\end{array} \right)
}{\left( \begin{array}{r}
24 \\
8
\end{array} \right) = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
2\lambda_{1}\  - \ 3\lambda_{2} \\
 - 2\lambda_{1}\  - \ 5\lambda_{2}
\end{array} \right)
}{2\lambda ₁\  - \ 3\lambda ₂\  = \ 24\ \ (1)
}{- 2\lambda ₁\  - \ 5\lambda ₂\  = \ 8\ \ (2)
}{Adding\ (1)\ and\ (2):
}{- 8\lambda ₂\  = \ 32
}{\lambda ₂\  = \  - 4
}{Substitute\ \lambda ₂\  = \  - 4\ into\ (1):
}{2\lambda ₁\  - \ 3( - 4)\  = \ 24
}{2\lambda ₁\  + \ 12\  = \ 24
}{\lambda ₁\  = \ 6}$$

# Parallel and Perpendicular Vectors

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** Parallel vectors                                               |
+:=============:+:=============:+:=============:+:=============:+:=============:+
| ✖             | ✔             | ✔             | ✔             | ✖             |
+---------------+---------------+---------------+---------------+---------------+
| Identify which of the following pairs of vectors are parallel.                |
+---------------+---------------+---------------+---------------+---------------+
| a.            | b.            | c.            | d.            | e.            |
+---------------+---------------+---------------+---------------+---------------+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** Parallel vectors                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+:=================================================:+:=================================================:+:=================================================:+:==================================================:+:=================================================:+
| ✖                                                 | ✔                                                 | ✔                                                 | ✔                                                  | ✖                                                 |
|                                                   |                                                   |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
| $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                          | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         |
| 3 \\                                              | 3 \\                                              | 3 \\                                              | 3 \\                                               | 3 \\                                              |
| 5                                                 | 5                                                 | 5                                                 | 5                                                  | 5                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r}  | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
| 5 \\                                              | 6 \\                                              |  - 6 \\                                           | 21 \\                                              | 21 \\                                             |
| 7                                                 | 10                                                |  - 10                                             | 35                                                 | 34                                                |
| \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                              | \end{array} \right)$$                             |
+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| Identify which of the following pairs of vectors are parallel.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| a.                                                | b.                                                | c.                                                | d.                                                 | e.                                                |
|                                                   |                                                   |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
| $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                          | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         |
| 2 \\                                              | 7 \\                                              |  - 3 \\                                           | 5 \\                                               | 12 \\                                             |
| 5                                                 | 10                                                | 4                                                 |  - 1                                               |  - 9                                              |
| \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r}  | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
| 16 \\                                             | 10 \\                                             | 6 \\                                              | 10 \\                                              | 4 \\                                              |
| 40                                                | 13                                                |  - 8                                              | 2                                                  |  - 3                                              |
| \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                              | \end{array} \right)$$                             |
+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| f.                                                | g.                                                | h.                                                | i.                                                 | j.                                                |
|                                                   |                                                   |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
| $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$3\overset{̰}{a}\ and\ 5\overset{̰}{a}$$           | $$\frac{20}{7}\overset{̰}{a}\ and - \overset{̰}{a}$$ | $$7\overset{̰}{a}\ and\ 7\overset{̰}{b}$$           |
| 1 \\                                              | 2 \\                                              |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
|  - 1                                              | 5                                                 |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
|  - 1 \\                                           | 2a \\                                             |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
| 1                                                 | 5a                                                |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             |                                                   |                                                    |                                                   |
+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Parallel Vectors**                                            |
+===================================================================+
| Two vectors $\overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overset{̰}{b}$ are **parallel**  |
| if they have the **same direction** or **opposite directions.**   |
|                                                                   |
| In other words, one vector is a scalar multiple of the other.     |
|                                                                   |
| $\overset{̰}{b} = \lambda\overset{̰}{a}$                            |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Example** Determine whether two vectors are parallel.                                                                                                                        |
+=========================================================================================+========================================================================================+
| Is $4\overset{̰}{a} + 6\overset{̰}{b}\$parallel to $10\overset{̰}{a} + 15\overset{̰}{b}$?   | Is $4\overset{̰}{a} + 6\overset{̰}{b}\$parallel to $5\overset{̰}{a} + 15\overset{̰}{b}$?   |
|                                                                                         |                                                                                        |
| $$4\overset{̰}{a} + 6\overset{̰}{b} = 2\left( 2\overset{̰}{a} + 3\overset{̰}{b} \right)$$   | $$4\overset{̰}{a} + 6\overset{̰}{b} = 2\left( 2\overset{̰}{a} + 3\overset{̰}{b} \right)$$  |
|                                                                                         |                                                                                        |
| $$10\overset{̰}{a} + 15\overset{̰}{b} = 5\left( 2\overset{̰}{a} + 3\overset{̰}{b} \right)$$ | $$10\overset{̰}{a} + 15\overset{̰}{b} = 5\left( \overset{̰}{a} + 3\overset{̰}{b} \right)$$ |
|                                                                                         |                                                                                        |
| Since both are scalar multiples of $2\overset{̰}{a} + 3\overset{̰}{b}$, they are          | The two vectors are not scalar multiples of each other; they are not parallel.         |
| parallel.                                                                               |                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                                                                                                  |
+===============================================================================+========================================================+
| Identify which of the following vectors are parallel.                                                                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $3\overset{̰}{a} + 7\overset{̰}{b}\$and $9\overset{̰}{a} + 21\overset{̰}{b}$  | b.  $2\overset{̰}{b} - 6\overset{̰}{a}$ and              |
|                                                                               |     $6\overset{̰}{b} - 24\overset{̰}{a}$                 |
| parallel                                                                      |                                                        |
|                                                                               | Not parallel                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| c.  $17\overset{̰}{a} + 17\overset{̰}{b}\$and                                   | d.  $\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b}\$and                |
|     $- 10\overset{̰}{a} - 10\overset{̰}{b}$                                     |     $\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a}$                    |
|                                                                               |                                                        |
| parallel                                                                      | parallel                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| e.  $4\overset{̰}{a} + 6\overset{̰}{b}\$and $6\overset{̰}{a} + 8\overset{̰}{b}$   | f.  $3\overset{̰}{a} - 4\overset{̰}{b}\$and              |
|                                                                               |     $- 9\overset{̰}{a} + 12\overset{̰}{b}$               |
| Not parallel                                                                  |                                                        |
|                                                                               | parallel                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| g.  $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{c} + \overset{̰}{d}$ and       | h.  $2\overset{̰}{a} - 3\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{c}$  |
|     $\frac{\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{c} + \overset{̰}{d}}{2}$ |     and                                                |
|                                                                               |     $4\overset{̰}{a} + 6\overset{̰}{b} + 2\overset{̰}{c}$ |
| parallel                                                                      |                                                        |
|                                                                               | Not parallel                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Perpendicular Vectors**                                                                                                            |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Two vectors $\overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overset{̰}{b}$ are **perpendicular** if they are 90° to each other.\                                  |
| In column notation, **components are swapped**, and exactly **one component changes sign**.                                            |
|                                                                                                                                        |
| This relates to gradients: perpendicular gradients are negative reciprocals of each other.\                                            |
| For a negative reciprocal, swap the numerator and denominator, and make one negative.\                                                 |
| (If both are negative, the sign stays the same.)                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                        |
| $\left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                               |
| x \\                                                                                                                                   |
| y                                                                                                                                      |
| \end{array} \right)\bot\left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                         |
|  - y \\                                                                                                                                |
| x                                                                                                                                      |
| \end{array} \right)\ or\ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                       |
| y \\                                                                                                                                   |
|  - x                                                                                                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$                                                                                                                   |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** Perpendicular vectors                                                                                                                                                                          |
+:=================================================:+:=================================================:+:=================================================:+:=================================================:+
| ✖                                                 | ✔                                                 | ✔                                                 | ✖                                                 |
|                                                   |                                                   |                                                   |                                                   |
| $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                         |
| 4 \\                                              | 4 \\                                              | 4 \\                                              | 4 \\                                              |
| 7                                                 | 7                                                 | 7                                                 | 7                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
| 7 \\                                              | 7 \\                                              |  - 7 \\                                           |  - 7 \\                                           |
| 4                                                 |  - 4                                              | 4                                                 |  - 4                                              |
| \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             | \end{array} \right)$$                             |

+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Perpendicular Vectors**                                       |
+===================================================================+
| Two vectors $\overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overset{̰}{b}$ are               |
| **perpendicular** if their **components are swapped**, and        |
| **exactly one component changes sign.**                           |
|                                                                   |
| Scalar multiples of perpendicular vectors remain perpendicular.   |
|                                                                   |
| $\left( \begin{array}{r}                                          |
| x \\                                                              |
| y                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)\bot\lambda\left( \begin{array}{r}             |
|  - y \\                                                           |
| x                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)\ or\ \lambda\left( \begin{array}{r}           |
| y \\                                                              |
|  - x                                                              |
| \end{array} \right)$                                              |
|                                                                   |
| Check if $\left( \begin{array}{r}                                 |
| a \\                                                              |
| b                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)\ \left( \begin{array}{r}                      |
| c \\                                                              |
| d                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right)$ is perpendicular by multiplying the          |
| components and see if they add to 0.                              |
|                                                                   |
| $$perpendicular\ if\ ac + bd = 0$$                                |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

| \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r}                             | \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r}                             |
|  - 14 \\                                                                      | 3.5 \\                                                                        |

| \end{array} \right)$$                                                         | \end{array} \right)$$                                                         |

| a.  $2\left( \begin{array}{r}                        | b.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}                          | c.  $3\left( \begin{array}{r}                       |
|     3 \\                                             |     4 \\                                              |     2 \\                                            |
|     5                                                |      - 6                                              |     7                                               |
|     \end{array} \right)and\ 3\left( \begin{array}{r} |     \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r}   |     \end{array} \right) - \ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|     2 \\                                             |     2 \\                                              |     1 \\                                            |
|     \frac{10}{3}                                     |      - 3                                              |     7                                               |
|     \end{array} \right)$                             |     \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |     \end{array} \right)and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|                                                      |     12 \\                                             |     10 \\                                           |
| $$2\left( \begin{array}{r}                           |      - 18                                             |     28                                              |
| 3 \\                                                 |     \end{array} \right)$                              |     \end{array} \right)$                            |
| 5                                                    |                                                       |                                                     |
| \end{array} \right) = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}      | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                             | $$3\left( \begin{array}{r}                          |
| 6 \\                                                 | 4 \\                                                  | 2 \\                                                |
| 10                                                   |  - 6                                                  | 7                                                   |
| \end{array} \right)$$                                | \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r}       | \end{array} \right) - \ \left( \begin{array}{r}     |
|                                                      | 2 \\                                                  | 1 \\                                                |
| $$3\left( \begin{array}{r}                           |  - 3                                                  | 7                                                   |
| 2 \\                                                 | \end{array} \right) = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}       | \end{array} \right) = \ \ \left( \begin{array}{r}   |
| \frac{10}{3}                                         | 6 \\                                                  | 5 \\                                                |
| \end{array} \right) = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}      |  - 9                                                  | 14                                                  |
| 6 \\                                                 | \end{array} \right)$$                                 | \end{array} \right)$$                               |
| 10                                                   |                                                       |                                                     |
| \end{array} \right)$$                                | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                             | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                           |
|                                                      | 12 \\                                                 | 10 \\                                               |
|                                                      |  - 18                                                 | 28                                                  |
|                                                      | \end{array} \right) = \ 2\left( \begin{array}{r}      | \end{array} \right) = \ 2\left( \begin{array}{r}    |
|                                                      | 6 \\                                                  | 5 \\                                                |

4.  Show that the following vectors are perpendicular.

+-----------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $- 2\left( \begin{array}{r}                           | b.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}                          | c.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}                          |
|     3 \\                                                  |     5 \\                                              |     7 \\                                              |
|     4                                                     |     2                                                 |      - 3                                              |
|     \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r}     |     \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r}   |     \end{array} \right) - \ \left( \begin{array}{r}   |
|     8 \\                                                  |     1 \\                                              |     2 \\                                              |
|      - 6                                                  |      - 3                                              |     1                                                 |
|     \end{array} \right)$                                  |     \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |     \end{array} \right)\ and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|                                                           |     1 \\                                              |     4 \\                                              |
| $$( - 6)(8) + \ ( - 8)( - 6) = \  - 48\  + \ 48\  = \ 0$$ |     6                                                 |     5                                                 |
|                                                           |     \end{array} \right)$                              |     \end{array} \right)$                              |
|                                                           |                                                       |                                                       |
|                                                           | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                             | $$\left( \begin{array}{r}                             |
|                                                           | 5 \\                                                  | 7 \\                                                  |
|                                                           | 2                                                     |  - 3                                                  |
|                                                           | \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r}       | \end{array} \right) - \ \left( \begin{array}{r}       |
|                                                           | 1 \\                                                  | 2 \\                                                  |
|                                                           |  - 3                                                  | 1                                                     |
|                                                           | \end{array} \right) = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}       | \end{array} \right) = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}       |
|                                                           | 6 \\                                                  | 5 \\                                                  |
|                                                           |  - 1                                                  |  - 4                                                  |
|                                                           | \end{array} \right)$$                                 | \end{array} \right)$$                                 |
|                                                           |                                                       |                                                       |
|                                                           | $$(6)(1) + \ ( - 1)(6) = \ 6\  - \ 6\  = \ 0$$        | $$(5)(4) + \ ( - 4)(5) = \ 20\  - \ 20\  = \ 0$$      |
+===========================================================+=======================================================+=======================================================+

|     3 \\                                            |     t \\                                            |
|     t                                               |     4                                               |

|     \end{array} \right)$                            |     \end{array} \right)and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |

|                                                     |     \end{array} \right)$                            |
|                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                     | $$t = 2$$                                           |

6.  Find the value of $s$ such that the vectors are perpendicular.

+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $2\left( \begin{array}{r}                       | b.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}                        |
|     3 \\                                            |     4 \\                                            |
|     s                                               |      - 5                                            |
|     \end{array} \right)and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |     \end{array} \right)and\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|     4 \\                                            |     s \\                                            |
|      - 6                                            |     3                                               |
|     \end{array} \right)$                            |     \end{array} \right) + \ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|                                                     |     2 \\                                            |
| $$s = 2$$                                           |     1                                               |
|                                                     |     \end{array} \right)$                            |
|                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                     | $$s = 3$$                                           |
+=====================================================+=====================================================+

7.  Given vectors $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    3 \\
     - 2
    \end{array} \right)$ and
    $\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    1 \\
    4
    \end{array} \right):$

    a.  Find the value of $p$ such that
        $p\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b}\$is parallel to
        $\left( \begin{array}{r}
        7 \\
        2
        \end{array} \right)$.\
        Remember that parallel means
        $\ p\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} = k\left( \begin{array}{r}
        7 \\
        2
        \end{array} \right)$

$${p\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b}\  = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
3p + 1 \\
 - 2p + 4
\end{array} \right) = \ k\left( \begin{array}{r}
7 \\
2
\end{array} \right)
}{3p + 1 = 7k\ \ (1)
}{- 2p + 4 = 2k\ \ (2)
}{rearranging\ (2):\ k = \frac{- 2p + 4}{2}
}{sub\ k\ into\ (1):\ \ 3p + 1 = \frac{7( - 2p + 4)}{2}
}{2(3p + 1) = \ 7( - 2p + 4)
}{6p\  + \ 2\  = \  - 14p\  + \ 28
}{20p\  = \ 26
}{p\  = \frac{13}{10}}$$

b.  Explain algebraically why the value of $p$ does not depend on the
    scalar multiple of $\left( \begin{array}{r}
    7 \\
    2
    \end{array} \right)$.

In the solution above, the $k$ cancels, so $p$ is independent of $k$.

c.  Explain this geometrically.

All scalar multiples of $\left( \begin{array}{r}
7 \\
2
\end{array} \right)$ represent the same direction.\
Parallel vectors share the same direction regardless of magnitude, so
$p$ depends only on direction, not the specific scalar multiple.

d.  Find the value of $q$ such that
    $\underset{\sim}{a}\  + \ q\underset{\sim}{b}\$is perpendicular to
    $\left( \begin{array}{r}
    5 \\
    1
    \end{array} \right)$

$${\underset{\sim}{a} + q\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
3 + q \\
 - 2 + 4q
\end{array} \right)perpendicular\ to\ \left( \begin{array}{r}
5 \\
1
\end{array} \right)
}{Perpendicular\ if\ \left( \begin{array}{r}
1 \\
 - 5
\end{array} \right)or\ \left( \begin{array}{r}
 - 1 \\
5
\end{array} \right)
}{Using\ \left( \begin{array}{r}
1 \\
 - 5
\end{array} \right):\ 3 + q\  = \ k
}{- 2 + 4q\  = \  - 5k
}{Substitute\ k\  = \ 3 + q:\ 
}{- 2 + 4q\  = \  - 5(3 + q)
}{- 2 + 4q\  = \  - 15 - 5q
}{9q\  = \  - 13
}{\ q\  = \  - \frac{13}{9}
}{Note\ that\ there\ is\ only\ one\ solution,\ even\ when\ you\ use\ the\ other\ case.}$$

# Component Form

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Basis Vectors**                                                                                                                                              |
+==================================================================================================================================================================+
| We can represent every vector using a **horizontal component** and a **vertical component**.                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image25.png){width="0.5444444444444444in"                               |
| height="0.5631944444444444in"}![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image25.png){width="0.4979166666666667in" |
| height="0.5388888888888889in"}We define the horizontal unit vector $\mathbf{i} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                         |
| 1 \\                                                                                                                                                             |
| 0                                                                                                                                                                |
| \end{array} \right)$ and the vertical unit vector $\mathbf{j} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                          |
| 0 \\                                                                                                                                                             |
| 1                                                                                                                                                                |
| \end{array} \right)$.                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image26.png){width="1.2468088363954506in"                               |
| height="1.3143897637795277in"}![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image27.png){width="1.2465277777777777in" |
| height="1.2895833333333333in"}![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image28.png){width="1.270138888888889in"  |
| height="1.3104166666666666in"}Every vector can be written as a sum of the unit vectors $\mathbf{i}$ and $\mathbf{j}$.                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |
| $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                                         |
| 4 \\                                                                                                                                                             |
| 3                                                                                                                                                                |
| \end{array} \right) = 4\mathbf{i} + 3\mathbf{j}$ $\overset{̰}{b} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                        |
|  - 2 \\                                                                                                                                                          |
|  - 5                                                                                                                                                             |
| \end{array} \right) = - 2\mathbf{i} - 5\mathbf{j}$ $\overset{̰}{c} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                      |
| 4 \\                                                                                                                                                             |
| 0                                                                                                                                                                |
| \end{array} \right) = 4\mathbf{i}$                                                                                                                               |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** vectors in component form.                                                             |
+==================================+===================================+=================================+
| Write the following vectors in component notation.                                                     |
+----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| a.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}     | b.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}      | c.  $\left( \begin{array}{r}    |
|     5 \\                         |      - 3 \\                       |     62 \\                       |
|     7                            |     2                             |      - 35                       |
|     \end{array} \right)$         |     \end{array} \right)$          |     \end{array} \right)$        |
+----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| Write the following vectors in column notation.                                                        |
+----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| a.  $4\mathbf{i} + 7\mathbf{j}$  | b.  $9\mathbf{i} - 2\mathbf{j}$   | c.  $6\mathbf{j} + 7\mathbf{i}$ |
+----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| Sketch the following vectors.                                                                          |
+----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
| a.  $- 2\mathbf{i +}5\mathbf{j}$ | b.  $- 3\mathbf{j} + 2\mathbf{i}$ | c.  $a\mathbf{i}$, where        |
|                                  |                                   |     $a > 0$                     |
+----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+---------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** vectors in component form.                                                                                                                                                    |
+====================================================================================================================================+===========================+==============================+
| For each vector, convert between the geometric representation, column notation, and component notation.                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
| **Geometric**                                                                                                                      | **Column Notation**       | **Component Notation**       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image29.png){width="1.3333333333333333in" |                           |                              |
| height="0.9310553368328959in"}                                                                                                     |                           |                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\left( \begin{array}{r} |                              |
|                                                                                                                                    | 5 \\                      |                              |
|                                                                                                                                    | 7                         |                              |
|                                                                                                                                    | \end{array} \right)$$     |                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    |                           | $$5\mathbf{i -}7\mathbf{j}$$ |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    |                           | $$5\mathbf{j -}7\mathbf{i}$$ |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image30.png){width="0.3653849518810149in" |                           |                              |
| height="1.112762467191601in"}                                                                                                      |                           |                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\left( \begin{array}{r} |                              |
|                                                                                                                                    | 7 \\                      |                              |
|                                                                                                                                    | 0                         |                              |
|                                                                                                                                    | \end{array} \right)$$     |                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image31.png){width="1.3333333333333333in" |                           |                              |
| height="1.00625in"}                                                                                                                |                           |                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Arithmetic with Vectors in Component Form**                                                                       |
+=======================================================================================================================+
| Just like column vector notation, to add or subtract vectors, add or subtract each component.                         |
|                                                                                                                       |
| $\overset{̰}{a} = x_{1}\mathbf{i} + y_{1}\mathbf{j}$                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                       |
| $\overset{̰}{b} = x_{2}\mathbf{i} + y_{2}\mathbf{j}$                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                       |
| $$\ \overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b} = \left( x_{1} + x_{2} \right)\mathbf{i} + \left( y_{1} + y_{2} \right)\mathbf{j}$$ |
|                                                                                                                       |
| To multiply a vector by a scalar, multiply each component separately.                                                 |
|                                                                                                                       |
| $$\ \ \ \overset{̰}{a} = x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j}\mathbf{\ }$$                                                        |
|                                                                                                                       |
| $$\lambda\overset{̰}{a} = \lambda\left( x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j} \right)$$                                            |
|                                                                                                                       |
| $\mathbf{=}\lambda x\mathbf{i +}\lambda y\mathbf{j}\mathbf{\ }$                                                       |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Example** Operate with vectors in component form.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

| Given $\overset{̰}{a} = 3\mathbf{i} - 2\mathbf{j}$ and $\overset{̰}{b} = - 4\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j}$, find these resultant vectors in component form:                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.                                                                                               | b.                                                                                        | c.                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                |
| $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$                                                                  | $\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a}$                                                           | $$\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ 3\overset{̰}{a} + \frac{\overset{̰}{b}}{2}$$                                             |
|                                                                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                |
| $= \left( 3\mathbf{i} - 2\mathbf{j} \right)\mathbf{+}\left( - 4\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j} \right)$ | $= \left( - 4\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j} \right) - \left( 3\mathbf{i} - 2\mathbf{j} \right)$ | $$= 3\left( 3\mathbf{i} - 2\mathbf{j} \right)\mathbf{+}\frac{1}{2}\left( - 4\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j} \right)$$ |
|                                                                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                |
| $$= - \mathbf{i} - 5\mathbf{j}$$                                                                 | $$= - 7\mathbf{i} - \mathbf{j}$$                                                          | $$= 7\mathbf{i}\mathbf{-}\frac{15}{2}\mathbf{j}$$                                                              |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                                                                                                                  |
+=================================+============================+====================+====================================================================+
| Given $\overset{̰}{a} = 5\mathbf{i + 3j}$ and $\overset{̰}{b} = - 2\mathbf{i + 4j}$, find these resultant vectors in component form:                     |
+---------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.                              | b.                                              | c.                                                                 |
|                                 |                                                 |                                                                    |
| $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$ | $\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a}$                 | $$\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ 2\overset{̰}{a} + \frac{\overset{̰}{b}}{2}$$ |
|                                 |                                                 |                                                                    |
| $$3\mathbf{i} + 7\mathbf{j}$$   | $$- 7\mathbf{i} + \mathbf{j}$$                  | $$9\mathbf{i} + 8\mathbf{j}$$                                      |
+---------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Given $\overset{̰}{a} = - 6\mathbf{i + j}$, $\overset{̰}{b} = 3\mathbf{i -}5\mathbf{j}$, $\overset{̰}{\mathbf{c}}\mathbf{= i + j}$**,** find these        |
| resultant vectors in component form:                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{c}$          | b.  $\overset{̰}{b} - 2\overset{̰}{a}$                                                    |
|                                                              |                                                                                         |
| $$- 8\mathbf{i +}7\mathbf{j}$$                               | $$15\mathbf{i} - 7\mathbf{j}$$                                                          |
+--------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Foundation

1.  Given $\overset{̰}{a} = 2\mathbf{i} + 5\mathbf{j}$ and
    $\overset{̰}{b} = 3\mathbf{i} + \mathbf{j}$, find these resultant
    vectors in component form:

+-------------------------------------+-------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$ | b.  $\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b}$ | c.  $2\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$ |
|                                     |                                     |                                      |
| $$5i\  + \ 6j$$                     | $$\  - i\  + \ 4j$$                 | $$7i\  + \ 11j$$                     |
+=====================================+=====================================+======================================+

2.  a.  For $\underset{\sim}{u} = \ 2\mathbf{i}\  + \mathbf{\ j}$ and
        $\underset{\sim}{v} = \  - \mathbf{i}\  + \ 2\mathbf{j}$, write
        $\underset{\sim}{u},\underset{\sim}{v}$ and
        $\underset{\sim}{u} + \underset{\sim}{v}$ as column vectors.

$$\left( \begin{array}{r}
1 \\
3
\end{array} \right)$$

b.  For $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    3 \\
    2
    \end{array} \right)\$and
    $\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    4 \\
    1
    \end{array} \right),$ write $\underset{\sim}{a},\underset{\sim}{b}$
    and $\underset{\sim}{a} - \underset{\sim}{b}$ in component form.

$$- \mathbf{i} + \mathbf{j}$$

3.  Given $\overset{̰}{a} = 4\mathbf{i} - 2\mathbf{j}$ and
    $\overset{̰}{b} = - \mathbf{i} + 3\mathbf{j}$, find these resultant
    vectors in component form:

+-------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a}$ | b.  $\overset{̰}{3a} - \overset{̰}{2b}$ |
|                                     |                                       |
| $$- 5i\  + \ 5j$$                   | $$14i\  - \ 12j$$                     |
+=====================================+=======================================+

c.  If $\overset{̰}{a} + k\overset{̰}{b} = 2i + 4j$

> Find $k$.

$${a\  + \ kb\  = \ 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j}
}{(4\mathbf{i}\  - \ 2\mathbf{j})\  + \ k( - \mathbf{i}\  + \ 3\mathbf{j})\  = \ 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j}
}{4\mathbf{i}\  - \ 2\mathbf{j}\  - \ k\mathbf{i}\  + \ 3k\mathbf{j}\  = \ 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j}
}{(4\  - \ k)\mathbf{i}\  + \ ( - 2\  + \ 3k)\mathbf{j}\  = \ 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j}
}{Equate\ i:\ 4\  - \ k\  = \ 2,\ k\  = \ 2
}{Equate\ j:\  - 2\  + \ 3k\  = \ 4,\ k = 2}$$

4.  Given $\overset{̰}{a}\  = \ 6\mathbf{i}\  - \ \mathbf{j}$ and
    $\overset{̰}{b}\  = \  - 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j}$**,** find the
    ratio $r:s$ if $r\overset{̰}{a} + s\overset{̰}{b} = 0$

$${r\left( 6\mathbf{i}\  - \ \mathbf{j} \right) + \ s\left( - 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j} \right) = \ 0
}{6r\mathbf{i}\  - \ r\mathbf{j}\  - \ 2s\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4s\mathbf{j}\  = \ 0
}{(6r\  - \ 2s)\mathbf{i}\  + \ ( - r\  + \ 4s)\mathbf{j}\  = \ 0
}{Equate\ \mathbf{i}:\ 6r\  - \ 2s\  = \ 0,\ 
}{6r\  = \ 2s,
}{\frac{r}{s} = \frac{1}{3}
}{r:s\  = \ 1:3}$$

# Calculating Magnitude and Direction

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Magnitude Notation**                                          |
+===================================================================+
| $\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right|$ represents the magnitude of a      |
| vector.                                                           |
|                                                                   |
| $\overset{̰}{a}$ if $\overset{̰}{a} =$ 8 m at 075°, then            |
| $\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| = 8$ m.                             |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** magnitude of a vector.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

| Find:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right|$                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | b.  $\left| \overrightarrow{AB} \right|$                                                                                                                                                                                                              | c.  $\left| \mathbf{c} \right|$                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | d.  $\left| \overset{̰}{d} \right|$                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | e.  $\left| \overset{̰}{e} \right|$                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
|                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
