|                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
|                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
|                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
|                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
|                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                                                             |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |                              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Calculating Magnitude**                                       |
+===================================================================+
| The magnitude of a vector                                         |
| $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r}                          |
| x \\                                                              |
| y                                                                 |
| \end{array} \right) = x\mathbf{i} + y\mathbf{j}$ is:              |
|                                                                   |
| $$\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| = \sqrt{x^{2} + y^{2}}$$           |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Calculate** magnitude of a vector                                                                                                         |
+==============================================+==============================================+=================================================+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r} | b.  $\overset{̰}{a} = \left( \begin{array}{r} | c.  $\overset{̰}{a} = 2\mathbf{i} + 5\mathbf{j}$ |
|     3 \\                                     |      - 3 \\                                  |                                                 |
|     1                                        |     1                                        |                                                 |
|     \end{array} \right)$                     |     \end{array} \right)$                     |                                                 |
|                                              |                                              |                                                 |
| $\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| =$             | $\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| =$             |                                                 |
+----------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
| d.  $\overset{̰}{a} = - 5\mathbf{i - 2j}$     | e.  $\overset{̰}{a} = 1.5\mathbf{i + j}$      | f.  $\overset{̰}{a} = - 9\mathbf{j}$             |
+----------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Direction**                                                                                                                   |
+===================================================================================================================================+
| Usually, the direction of a vector is stated as the **angle of inclination** from the positive $x$ axis.                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image32.png){width="6.388888888888889in" |
| height="2.1227088801399825in"}                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| - In navigation scenarios, you may need to use true bearings instead of angle of inclination.                                     |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** Direction of a vector                                        |
+=========================+=========================+=========================+
| Draw the angle representing the direction of the vector.                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
| Draw the angle representing the direction of the vector.                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
| a.                      | b.                      | c.                      |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
| d.                      | e.                      | f.                      |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Direction**                                                   |
+===================================================================+
| Usually, the direction of a vector is stated as the **angle of    |
| inclination** from the positive $x$ axis. We use trigonometry to  |
| find the direction. A diagram is usually essential.               |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 1\. Draw a sketch of the vector, showing the horizontal and       |
| vertical components.                                              |
|                                                                   |
| 2\. Label the reference angle and use trigonometry to calculate   |
| it:                                                               |
|                                                                   |
| $$A = \tan^{- 1}\left( \frac{|y|}{|x|} \right)$$                  |
|                                                                   |
| 3\. Find the angle of inclination using angle relationships.      |
|                                                                   |
| - In navigation scenarios, you may need to use true bearings      |
|   instead of angle of inclination.                                |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Example** Calculate the direction of a vector.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+====================================================================================================================================+====================================================================+====================================+
| Find the direction of the vector $\overset{̰}{a} = 5\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j.}$ **\**                                                                                                                                                          |
| Answer as an angle of inclination to the nearest degree.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image33.png){width="1.8333333333333333in" | 2\.                                                                | 3\.                                |
| height="1.0556550743657043in"}1.                                                                                                   |                                                                    |                                    |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\ \ \ \ A = \tan^{- 1}{\left( \frac{3}{5} \right) =}31{^\circ}$$ | $$\therefore\theta = 360 - 31$$    |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                                    |                                    |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                                    | $$\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \  = 329{^\circ}$$ |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------+

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                                                              |
+================================================+===================================================+
| Find the direction of the vector. Answer as an angle of inclination to one decimal place.          |
+------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{a} = - 3\mathbf{i + j}$        | b.  $\overset{̰}{a} = - 2\mathbf{i} - 7\mathbf{j}$ |
|                                                |                                                   |
| $$161.6{^\circ}$$                              | $$254.1{^\circ}$$                                 |
+------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| Find the direction of the vector. Answer as a **true bearing** the nearest degree.                 |
+------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overset{̰}{a} = 3\mathbf{i} - \mathbf{j}$ | b.  $\overset{̰}{a} = - 2\mathbf{i} + 2\mathbf{j}$ |
|                                                |                                                   |
| $$108{^\circ}$$                                | $$315{^\circ}$$                                   |
+------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+

Foundation

1.  Find the exact magnitude of each vector.

+------------------------------+--------------------------------+------------------------------+
| a.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} | b.  $\ \left( \begin{array}{r} | c.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} |
|      - 2 \\                  |     5 \\                       |      - 9 \\                  |
|     3                        |     7                          |      - 7                     |
|     \end{array} \right)$     |     \end{array} \right)$       |     \end{array} \right)$     |
|                              |                                |                              |
| $$\sqrt{13}$$                | $$\sqrt{74}$$                  | $$\sqrt{130}$$               |
+==============================+================================+==============================+
| d.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} | e.  $\ \left( \begin{array}{r} |                              |
|     2 \\                     |     4 \\                       |                              |
|     9                        |      - 1                       |                              |
|     \end{array} \right)$     |     \end{array} \right)$       |                              |
|                              |                                |                              |
| $$\sqrt{85}$$                | $$\sqrt{17}$$                  |                              |
+------------------------------+--------------------------------+------------------------------+

2.  Find the direction of each vector to the nearest degree.

+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+
| a.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} | b.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} | c.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} |
|     1 \\                     |     2 \\                     |      - 2 \\                  |
|     4                        |     1                        |      - 5                     |
|     \end{array} \right)$     |     \end{array} \right)$     |     \end{array} \right)$     |
|                              |                              |                              |
| $$76{^\circ}$$               | $$27{^\circ}$$               | $$248{^\circ}$$              |
+==============================+==============================+==============================+
| d.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} | e.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} | f.  $\left( \begin{array}{r} |
|      - 1 \\                  |     6 \\                     |      - 3 \\                  |
|     3                        |      - 2                     |     4                        |
|     \end{array} \right)$     |     \end{array} \right)$     |     \end{array} \right)$     |
|                              |                              |                              |
| $$108{^\circ}$$              | $$342{^\circ}$$              | $$127{^\circ}$$              |
+------------------------------+------------------------------+------------------------------+

3.  If $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ 8\mathbf{i}\  + \ 6\mathbf{j}$, find:

+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right|$ | b.  $2\underset{\sim}{a}$                    | c.  $\left| 2\underset{\sim}{a} \right|$ |
|                                         |                                              |                                          |
| $$10$$                                  | $$16\mathbf{i} + 12\mathbf{j}$$              | $$20$$                                   |
+=========================================+==============================================+==========================================+
| d.  $- 5\underset{\sim}{a}$             | e.  $\ \left| - 5\underset{\sim}{a} \right|$ |                                          |
|                                         |                                              |                                          |
| $$- 40\mathbf{i} - 30\mathbf{j}$$       | $$50$$                                       |                                          |
+-----------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------+

Development

4.  Find the magnitude and direction of each vector. Give your answers
    in exact form.

+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ 2\mathbf{i\ } + \ 2\mathbf{j}$          | b.  $\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|                                                                     |     1 \\                                            |
| $$2\sqrt{2},\ \ \ 45{^\circ}$$                                      |      - \sqrt{3}                                     |
|                                                                     |     \end{array} \right)$                            |
|                                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                     | $$2,\ \ \ 300{^\circ}$$                             |
+=====================================================================+=====================================================+
| c.  $\underset{\sim}{c} = \  - 3\sqrt{3}\mathbf{i} + \ 3\mathbf{j}$ | d.  $\underset{\sim}{d} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r} |
|                                                                     |      - \sqrt{6} \\                                  |
| $$6,\ \ \ 150{^\circ}$$                                             |      - \sqrt{6}                                     |
|                                                                     |     \end{array} \right)$                            |
|                                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                     | $$2\sqrt{3},\ \ \ 225{^\circ}$$                     |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+

5.  Suppose that $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ 2\mathbf{i}\  + \ 3\mathbf{j}$
    and $\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \mathbf{i}\  - \ 4\mathbf{j}$. Find:

+--------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b}$                | b.  $\ \left| \underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} \right|$ | c.  $\underset{\sim}{a} - \underset{\sim}{b}$                    |
|                                                              |                                                                |                                                                  |
| $$3\mathbf{i} - \mathbf{j}$$                                 | $$\sqrt{10}$$                                                  | $$\mathbf{i} + 7\mathbf{j}$$                                     |
+==============================================================+================================================================+==================================================================+
| d.  $\left| \underset{\sim}{a} - \underset{\sim}{b} \right|$ | e.  $- 3\underset{\sim}{a} - 2\underset{\sim}{b}$              | f.  $\left| - 3\underset{\sim}{a} - 2\underset{\sim}{b} \right|$ |
|                                                              |                                                                |                                                                  |
| $$5\sqrt{2}$$                                                | $$- 8\mathbf{i} - \mathbf{j}$$                                 | $$\sqrt{65}$$                                                    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+

6.  Vector $\underset{\sim}{v} = \ a\mathbf{i}\  + \ 3\mathbf{j}$ has
    magnitude 5. Find the value of $a$.

$${\left| \underset{\sim}{v} \right| = \ \sqrt{a^{2} + \ 3^{2}} = \ 5
}{a²\  + \ 9\  = \ 25
}{a²\  = \ 16
}{a\  = \  \pm 4}$$

7.  Vector $\underset{\sim}{v} = \ 6\mathbf{i\ } + \ b\mathbf{j}$ has
    direction 45°. What is the value of $b$?

$${\tan(45{^\circ}) = \frac{b}{6}
}{1\  = \frac{b}{6}
}{b\  = \ 6}$$

8.  Find the magnitude and direction of
    $\underset{\sim}{x} + \underset{\sim}{y}$ given that
    $\underset{\sim}{x} = \ 5\mathbf{i}\  + \ 3\mathbf{j}\$and
    $\underset{\sim}{y} = \  - 2\mathbf{i}\  - \ 5\mathbf{j}.$\
    Give magnitude in exact form and direction to the nearest degree.

$${\underset{\sim}{x} + \underset{\sim}{y} = \ (5i\  + \ 3j) + \ ( - 2i\  - \ 5j) = \ 3i\  - \ 2j
}{\left| \underset{\sim}{x} + \underset{\sim}{y} \right| = \ \sqrt{3^{2} + \ ( - 2)^{2}} = \ \sqrt{9\  + \ 4} = \ \sqrt{13}
}{tan(\theta)\  = \  - \frac{2}{3}
}{\theta\  = \ tan^{- 1}\left( - \frac{2}{3} \right) = \  - 33.7{^\circ}
}{Direction\  = \ 360{^\circ}\  - \ 33.7{^\circ}\  \approx \ 326{^\circ}}$$

9.  Find the magnitude and direction of
    $\underset{\sim}{b} - \underset{\sim}{a}\$if
    $\underset{\sim}{a} = \mathbf{\ i}\  + \ 7\mathbf{j}$ and
    $\underset{\sim}{b} = \ 4\mathbf{i\ } - \ 9\mathbf{j}$.\
    Give magnitude in exact form and direction to the nearest degree.

$${\underset{\sim}{b} - \underset{\sim}{a} = \ (4i\  - \ 9j) - \ (i\  + \ 7j) = \ 3i\  - \ 16j
}{\left| \underset{\sim}{b} - \underset{\sim}{a} \right| = \ \sqrt{3^{2} + \ ( - 16)^{2}} = \ \sqrt{9\  + \ 256} = \ \sqrt{265}
}{tan(\theta)\  = \  - \frac{16}{3}
}{\theta\  = \ tan^{- 1}\left( - \frac{16}{3} \right) = \  - 79.4{^\circ}
}{Direction\  = \ 360{^\circ}\  - \ 79.4{^\circ}\  \approx \ 281{^\circ}}$$

10. Given $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
    5 \\
     - 12
    \end{array} \right)$ and
    $\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}
     - 15 \\
     - 8
    \end{array} \right)$, show that:

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\left| 2\underset{\sim}{a} \right| = \ 2\left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right|$                                                          | b.  $\left| - \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ \left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right|$                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
| $${\underset{\sim}{a} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                        | $${\underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                       |
| 5 \\                                                                                                                                     |  - 15 \\                                                                                                                                                |
|  - 12                                                                                                                                    |  - 8                                                                                                                                                    |
| \end{array} \right)                                                                                                                      | \end{array} \right)                                                                                                                                     |
| }{\underset{\sim}{2a} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                        | }{- \underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                      |
| 10 \\                                                                                                                                    | 15 \\                                                                                                                                                   |
|  - 24                                                                                                                                    | 8                                                                                                                                                       |
| \end{array} \right)                                                                                                                      | \end{array} \right)                                                                                                                                     |
| }{\left| \underset{\sim}{2a} \right| = \ \sqrt{10^{2} + \ ( - 24)^{2}}                                                                   | }{\left| - \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ \ \sqrt{15^{2} + \ 8^{2}}                                                                                     |
| }{= \ 26                                                                                                                                 | }{= \ 17                                                                                                                                                |
| }{\left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| = \ \sqrt{5^{2} + \ ( - 12)^{2}}                                                                     | }{\left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right|\  = \ \ \sqrt{( - 15)^{2} + \ ( - 8)^{2}}                                                                           |
| }{= \ 13                                                                                                                                 | }{= \ 17                                                                                                                                                |
| }{LHS:\ \left| 2\underset{\sim}{a} \right| = \ 26\                                                                                       | }{LHS:\ \left| - \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ 17                                                                                                      |
| }{RHS:\ 2\left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| = \ 2(13) = \ 26                                                                              | }{RHS:\ \left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ 17                                                                                                        |
| }{Hence,\ LHS\  = \ RHS.}$$                                                                                                              | }{Hence,\ LHS\  = \ RHS.}$$                                                                                                                             |
+==========================================================================================================================================+=========================================================================================================================================================+
| c.  $\left| \underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} \right| < \ \left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| + \ \left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right|$ | d.  $\left| \underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} \right| > \ \left| \left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| - \ \left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right| \right|$ |
|                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
| $${\underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} = \ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                   | $${\ LHS:\ \left| \underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ 5\sqrt{10} = \ 15.811\ldots                                                       |
| 5\  + \ ( - 15) \\                                                                                                                       | }{RHS:\left| \left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| - \ \left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right| \right| = |13\  - \ 17|\  = \ 4                                    |
| ( - 12) + \ ( - 8)                                                                                                                       | }{Hence,\ LHS\  > \ RHS.}$$                                                                                                                             |
| \end{array} \right)                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{= \ \left( \begin{array}{r}                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                         |
|  - 10 \\                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                         |
|  - 20                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                         |
| \end{array} \right)                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{\left| \underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ \sqrt{( - 10)^{2} + \ ( - 20)^{2}}                                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{= \ 5\sqrt{10}                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{\left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| = \ \sqrt{5^{2} + \ ( - 12)^{2}}                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{= \ 13                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{\left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ \sqrt{( - 15)^{2} + \ ( - 8)^{2}}                                                                |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{= \ 17                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{LHS:\ \left| \underset{\sim}{a} + \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ 5\sqrt{10} = \ 15.811\ldots                                           |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{RHS:\ \left| \underset{\sim}{a} \right| + \ \left| \underset{\sim}{b} \right| = \ 13\  + \ 17\  = \ 30                                 |                                                                                                                                                         |
| }{Hence,\ LHS\  < \ RHS.}$$                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                         |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

# Unit Vectors in a Particular Direction

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Unit Vector**                                                                                                                 |
+===================================================================================================================================+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image34.png){width="2.187166447944007in" |
| height="0.8136679790026247in"}A **unit vector** is a vector that has a **magnitude** (length) of **1**.                           |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$ is the unit vector in the direction of $\overset{̰}{a}$.                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** the unit vector                                                                                             |
+======================================+=====================+======================+========================================+
| The vector $\overset{̰}{a}$ is shown. Sketch the unit vector $\widehat{a}$:                                                 |
+--------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
| $$\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| = 2$$ | $$\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| = 3$$       | $$\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| = 2.5$$ |
|                                      |                                            |                                        |
| $$\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$$          | $$\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$$                | $$\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$$            |
+--------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+
| The vector $\overset{̰}{b}$ is shown. Sketch the unit vector $\widehat{b}$, given:                                          |
+------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\left| \overset{̰}{b} \right| = 3$                     | b.  $\left| \overset{̰}{b} \right| = 2$                        |
+------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| c.  $\left| \overset{̰}{b} \right| = 4$                     | d.  $\left| \overset{̰}{b} \right| = 2.5$                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Finding the Unit Vector**                                                                                                     |
+===================================================================================================================================+
| A **unit vector** is a vector that has a **magnitude** (length) of **1**.                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$ is the unit vector in the direction of $\overset{̰}{a}$.                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image34.png){width="2.187166447944007in" |
| height="0.8136679790026247in"}                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| To find $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}:$                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| 1\. Find the magnitude of $\overset{̰}{a}:\ \ \left| \overset{̰}{a} \right|$                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| 2\. Divide $\overset{̰}{a}$ by its magnitude.                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                   |
| $$\ \ \ \ \ \widehat{\overset{̰}{a}} = \frac{\overset{̰}{a}}{|\overset{̰}{a}|}$$                                                     |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Example** Find unit vector in a given direction.                                                                                                                                                 |
+======================================================================================================================================================================================================+
| $\overset{̰}{a} = - 7\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j}$**.** Find the unit vector in the same direction: $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| > ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image35.png){width="2.1652799650043746in" height="1.2135422134733158in"}1.                                |
| >                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| > $$\left| \overset{̰}{a} \right|\mathbf{=}\sqrt{( - 7)^{2} + ( - 3)^{2}} = \sqrt{58}$$                                                                                                               |
| >                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| > 2\.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| >                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| > $$\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}} = \frac{\overset{̰}{a}}{|\overset{̰}{a}|} = \frac{\left( - 7\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j} \right)}{\sqrt{58}} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{58}}\left( - 7\mathbf{i} - 3\mathbf{j} \right)$$ |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                             |
+===================================================================+
| $\overset{̰}{a} = 5\mathbf{i} - 8\mathbf{j}$**.** Find the unit    |
| vector in the same direction: $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$           |
|                                                                   |
| $$\frac{1}{\sqrt{89}}\left( 5\mathbf{i} - 8\mathbf{j} \right)$$   |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| $\overset{̰}{a} = - 2\mathbf{i +}9\mathbf{j}$**.** Find the unit   |
| vector in the same direction: $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$           |
|                                                                   |
| $$\frac{1}{\sqrt{85}}\left( - 2\mathbf{i} + 9\mathbf{j} \right)$$ |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

Foundation

1.  Find the unit vector $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$ if:

+-------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ 3\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j}$  | b.  $\underset{\sim}{a} = \ 5\mathbf{i\ } - \ 12\mathbf{j}$   | c.  $\underset{\sim}{a} = \  - 6\mathbf{i}\  + \ 8\mathbf{j}$  |
|                                                             |                                                               |                                                                |
| $$\frac{1}{5}\left( 3\mathbf{i}\  + \ 4\mathbf{j} \right)$$ | $$\frac{1}{13}\left( 5\mathbf{i}\  - \ 12\mathbf{j} \right)$$ | $$\frac{1}{10}\left( - 6\mathbf{i}\  + \ 8\mathbf{j} \right)$$ |
+=============================================================+===============================================================+================================================================+

2.  If
    $\underset{\sim}{u} = \ \mathbf{i}\  + \ 2\mathbf{j},\underset{\sim}{v} = \  - 4\mathbf{i}\  + \ 3\mathbf{j}$
    and $\underset{\sim}{w} = \underset{\sim}{u} + \underset{\sim}{v},$
    find:

+-----------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\underset{\sim}{\widehat{u}}$                              | b.  $\underset{\sim}{\widehat{v}}$                  | c.  $\underset{\sim}{\widehat{w}}$                                  |
|                                                                 |                                                     |                                                                     |
| $$\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}\mathbf{i} + \frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\mathbf{j}$$ | $$- \frac{4}{5}\mathbf{i} + \frac{3}{5}\mathbf{j}$$ | $$- \frac{3}{\sqrt{34}}\mathbf{i} + \frac{5}{\sqrt{34}}\mathbf{j}$$ |
+=================================================================+=====================================================+=====================================================================+

3.  The unit vector in the direction of $\underset{\sim}{a}$ is
    $\frac{3}{5}\mathbf{i}\  + \frac{4}{5}\mathbf{j}$. Find the vector
    $\underset{\sim}{a}$ if $|\overset{̰}{a}|\  = \ 10$.

$$\underset{\sim}{a} = \left| \overset{̰}{a} \right| \times \widehat{\overset{̰}{a}} = \ 10\left( \frac{3}{5}i\  + \frac{4}{5}j \right) = \ 6i\  + \ 8j$$

4.  $\underset{\sim}{a}\  = \ k\mathbf{i}\  + \ 3\mathbf{j}$ where
    $k\  > \ 0$. If $|\overset{̰}{a}|\  = \ 5$, find the unit vector in
    the same direction $\widehat{\overset{̰}{a}}$.

$${|\overset{̰}{a}|²\  = \ k²\  + \ 9\  = \ 25
}{k^{2} = \ 16,\ 
}{k\  = \ 4\ (since\ k\  > \ 0)
}{\underset{\sim}{a}\  = \ 4i\  + \ 3j
}{\underset{\sim}{â}\  = \frac{1}{5}(4i\  + \ 3j)}$$

# Point to Point Notation

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Vector Point-to-Point Notation**                                                                                                      |
+===========================================================================================================================================+
| We can communicate the following vector quantity in these ways:                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| ![A black line with letters and a letter AI-generated content may be                                                                      |
| incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image4.png){width="1.3630872703412074in" |
| height="1.3468088363954505in"}                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| Magnitude & direction: 3 cm northeast OR\                                                                                                 |
| 3 cm at angle of inclination $45{^\circ}$                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                           |
| Variable notation: $\overset{̰}{a}$, $\mathbf{a}$, or $\overrightarrow{a}$\                                                                |
| Point-to-point notation: $\overrightarrow{PQ}$ (but **not** $\overrightarrow{QP}$)                                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** point-to-point notation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |

| Label these vectors using $\overrightarrow{PQ}$ notation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | b.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | c.  ![A black line with a letter b and a point AI-generated content may be incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image36.png){width="1.2083333333333333in" height="1.2597222222222222in"}![A black line with a arrow pointing to the right AI-generated content may be                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |     incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image37.png){width="1.2083333333333333in" height="1.242361111111111in"}![A black line with a letter and arrow AI-generated content may be incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image38.png){width="0.6875in" height="0.8604166666666667in"}                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sketch these vectors on the grid below:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | b.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | c.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | d.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| $$\overrightarrow{AB}$$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$\overrightarrow{BA}$$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$\overrightarrow{AZ}$$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$\overrightarrow{ZC}$$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
