+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |

|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
|                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Example** Interpret point-to-point notation.                                                                                                        |
+=============================================+=============================================+=============================================================+
| $PQRS$ is a parallelogram where $\overrightarrow{PQ} = \overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overrightarrow{QR} = \overset{̰}{b}$.                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                         |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image39.png){width="2.9in" height="1.41876968503937in"}        |
|                                                                                                                                                         |
| Find expressions in terms of $\overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overset{̰}{b}$ for:                                                                                   |
+---------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overrightarrow{QP} = - \overset{̰}{a}$ | b.  $\overrightarrow{SR} = \overset{̰}{a}$   | c.  $\overrightarrow{PR} = \overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$   |
+---------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+
| d.  $\overrightarrow{RQ} = - \overset{̰}{b}$ | e.  $\overrightarrow{SP} = - \overset{̰}{b}$ | f.  $\overrightarrow{RP} = - \overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b}$ |
+---------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                                                                                                             |
+====================================+====================================+====================================+====================================+
| $PQRSTU$ is a regular hexagon. $\overrightarrow{PQ} = \overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overrightarrow{QR} = \overset{̰}{b}$,                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                   |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image40.png){width="1.9995723972003498in"                |
| height="1.6849846894138232in"}                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                   |
| Find in terms of $\overset{̰}{a}$ and $\overset{̰}{b}:$                                                                                             |
+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overrightarrow{PX}$          | b.  $\overrightarrow{SP}$          | c.  $\overrightarrow{QX}$          | d.  $\overrightarrow{SR}$          |
|                                    |                                    |                                    |                                    |
| $$\overset{̰}{b}$$                  | $$- 2\overset{̰}{b}$$               | $$\overset{̰}{b} - \overset{̰}{a}$$  | $$\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b}$$  |
+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+=====================================================================+===================================================================+===================================================================+============================+======================================+
| $ABC$ is a triangle where $\overrightarrow{AB} = \overset{̰}{p}$ and $\overrightarrow{BC} = 2\overset{̰}{p} - \overset{̰}{q}$.                                                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image41.png){width="2.4604319772528433in" height="1.4031649168853892in"}                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Find expressions in terms of $\overset{̰}{p}$ and $\overset{̰}{q}$ for:                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overrightarrow{BA}$                                           | b.  $\overrightarrow{CB}$                                         | c.  $\overrightarrow{AC}$                                                                      | d.  $\overrightarrow{CA}$            |
|                                                                     |                                                                   |                                                                                                |                                      |
| $$- \overset{̰}{p}$$                                                 | $$- 2\overset{̰}{p} + \overset{̰}{q}$$                              | $$3\overset{̰}{p} - \overset{̰}{q}$$                                                             | $$- 3\overset{̰}{p} + \overset{̰}{q}$$ |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+
| - **Important Vector Laws**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The following laws are useful for solving geometrical problems:                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Commutative Law**                                                 | ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image42.png){width="1.847561242344707in"     | You can add vectors in any order.                                 |
|                                                                     | height="1.230596019247594in"}                                                                                                         |                                                                   |
| $$\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b} = \overset{̰}{b} + \overset{̰}{a}$$   |                                                                                                                                       |                                                                   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Negative Vector Law**                                             | ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image43.png){width="2.869812992125984in"     | Reversing a vector exchanges its tip and tail.                    |
|                                                                     | height="1.445161854768154in"}                                                                                                         |                                                                   |
| $\overrightarrow{AB} = - \overrightarrow{BA}$                       |                                                                                                                                       |                                                                   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Triangle Law of Addition**                                        | ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image44.png){width="1.4949267279090113in"    | When two vectors are placed **head-to-tail**, the resultant       |
|                                                                     | height="1.3497265966754155in"}                                                                                                        | vector connects the tail of the first vector to the head of the   |
| $$\overrightarrow{AB} + \overrightarrow{BC} = \overrightarrow{AC}$$ |                                                                                                                                       | second vector.                                                    |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Parallelogram Law of Subtraction**                                | ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image45.png){width="2.361111111111111in"     | The difference between two vectors equals the vector from the     |
|                                                                     | height="1.1722222222222223in"}                                                                                                        | head of the second vector to the head of the first vector.        |
| $$\overrightarrow{AB} - \overrightarrow{AD} = \overrightarrow{DB}$$ |                                                                                                                                       |                                                                   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Interpret** Triangle and parallelogram laws                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+====================================================================================================================================+===========================================================================================================+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image46.png){width="2.3830260279965003in" height="1.356013779527559in"}Find expressions using the laws, then confirm your answer using the            |
| parallelogram diagram.                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| +-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+                                                                                                                                          |
| | a.  $\overrightarrow{AB}$ $+$                   | b.  $\overrightarrow{AC} + \overrightarrow{CB}$ |                                                                                                                                          |
| |     $\overrightarrow{BC}$                       |                                                 |                                                                                                                                          |
| |                                                 | $=$ .........                                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| | $=$ .........                                   |                                                 |                                                                                                                                          |
| +=================================================+=================================================+                                                                                                                                          |
| | c.  $\overrightarrow{AC} - \overrightarrow{AB}$ | d.  $\overrightarrow{AD} - \overrightarrow{AB}$ |                                                                                                                                          |
| |                                                 |                                                 |                                                                                                                                          |
| | $=$ .........                                   | $=$ .........                                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| +-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+                                                                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image47.png){width="2.2743897637795274in" height="1.5490923009623796in"}                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| +-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+                                                                                                                                          |
| | a.  $\overrightarrow{PQ}$ $+$                   | b.  $\overrightarrow{QR} + \overrightarrow{RS}$ |                                                                                                                                          |
| |     $\overrightarrow{QS}$                       |                                                 |                                                                                                                                          |
| |                                                 | $=$ .........                                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| | $=$ .........                                   |                                                 |                                                                                                                                          |
| +=================================================+=================================================+                                                                                                                                          |
| | c.  $\overrightarrow{PS} - \overrightarrow{PQ}$ | d.  $\overrightarrow{SR} - \overrightarrow{SQ}$ |                                                                                                                                          |
| |                                                 |                                                 |                                                                                                                                          |
| | $=$ .........                                   | $=$ .........                                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| +-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+                                                                                                                                          |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Example** Apply algebraic vector laws                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Prove that:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| $$\overrightarrow{PR} - \overrightarrow{QR} + \overrightarrow{QS} = \overrightarrow{PS}$$                                          | $$\overrightarrow{EG} - \overrightarrow{EF} - \overrightarrow{GF} = 2\overrightarrow{FG}$$                |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                           |
| $${LHS = \overrightarrow{PR} + \overrightarrow{RQ} + \overrightarrow{QS}\ \ \ \ \ \ ( - \overrightarrow{QR} = \overrightarrow{RQ}) | $${LHS = \overrightarrow{FG} - \overrightarrow{GF}\ \ \ \ \ \ \ (▱\ law)                                  |
| }{= \overrightarrow{PQ} + \overrightarrow{QS}\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ (\Delta\ law)                                       | }{= \overrightarrow{FG} + \overrightarrow{FG}\ \ \ \ \ \ \ ( - \overrightarrow{GF} = \overrightarrow{FG}) |
| }{= \overrightarrow{PS}\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ (\Delta\ law)                                     | }{= 2\overrightarrow{FG}                                                                                  |
| }{= RHS}$$                                                                                                                         | }{= RHS}$$                                                                                                |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Guided Practice**                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+===================================================================================================================+=============================================================================================================+
| Prove that:                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overrightarrow{AB} - \overrightarrow{CB} + \overrightarrow{CD} = \overrightarrow{AD}$                       | b.  $\overrightarrow{PT} - \overrightarrow{PR} - \overrightarrow{TR} = 2\overrightarrow{RT}$                |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| c.  $\overrightarrow{OQ} - \overrightarrow{OP} + \overrightarrow{QR} - \overrightarrow{SR} = \overrightarrow{PS}$ | d.  $\overrightarrow{GH} - \overrightarrow{FE} - \overrightarrow{EH} + \overrightarrow{FG} = \overset{̰}{0}$ |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Foundation

1.  Given parallelogram ABCD, write the vector that is:

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image48.png){width="2.2784722222222222in" | a.  $\overrightarrow{AB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{BC}$ | b.  $\overrightarrow{AD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DB}$ |
| height="1.5486111111111112in"}                                                                                                     |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{AC}$$                             | $$\overrightarrow{AB}$$                             |
+====================================================================================================================================+=====================================================+=====================================================+
|                                                                                                                                    | c.  $\overrightarrow{DC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CA}$ | d.  $\overrightarrow{CD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CB}$ |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{DA}$$                             | $$\overrightarrow{CA}$$                             |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    | e.  $\overrightarrow{DA}\  - \ \overrightarrow{AB}$ | f.  $\overrightarrow{AB}\  - \ \overrightarrow{AD}$ |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{CA}$$                             | $$\overrightarrow{DB}$$                             |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    | g.  $\overrightarrow{BC}\  - \ \overrightarrow{CD}$ |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{AC}$$                             |                                                     |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+

2.  For the diagram, state the resultant vector of:

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    | a.  $\overrightarrow{AB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{BG}$                           | b.  $\overrightarrow{GE}\  + \ \overrightarrow{EF}$ |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                                               |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{AG}$$                                                       | $$\overrightarrow{GF}$$                             |
+====================================================================================================================================+===============================================================================+=====================================================+
|                                                                                                                                    | c.  $\overrightarrow{BG}\  - \ \overrightarrow{CG}$                           | d.  $\overrightarrow{GC}\  - \ \overrightarrow{BC}$ |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                                               |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{BC}$$                                                       | $$\overrightarrow{GB}$$                             |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image49.png){width="2.2101443569553805in" | e.  $\overrightarrow{GE}\  + \ \overrightarrow{EF}\  + \ \overrightarrow{FA}$ |                                                     |
| height="1.9978904199475065in"}                                                                                                     |                                                                               |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{GA}$$                                                       |                                                     |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+

3.  For the diagram, state the resultant vector of:

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
| ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image50.png){width="2.3057972440944883in" | a.  $\overrightarrow{AD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DO}$ | b.  $\overrightarrow{DE}\  + \ \overrightarrow{EC}$ |
| height="1.0724639107611549in"}                                                                                                     |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{AO}$$                             | $$\overrightarrow{DC}$$                             |
+====================================================================================================================================+=====================================================+=====================================================+
|                                                                                                                                    | c.  $\overrightarrow{AE}\  - \ \overrightarrow{AO}$ | d.  $\overrightarrow{DB}\  - \ \overrightarrow{DA}$ |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{OE}$$                             | $$\overrightarrow{AB}$$                             |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                                                                    | e.  $\overrightarrow{AE}\  - \ \overrightarrow{AC}$ |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    |                                                     |                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                    | $$\overrightarrow{CE}$$                             |                                                     |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+

4.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image51.png){width="1.6111111111111112in"
    height="1.2108169291338582in"}In the diagram,
    $\overrightarrow{WX}\  = \ \overrightarrow{ZY}$. Explain why WXYZ is
    a parallelogram.

Since vectors $\overrightarrow{WX}$ and $\overrightarrow{ZY}$ are equal,
the opposite sides WX and ZY are parallel and the same length, so WXYZ
is a parallelogram.

5.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image52.png){width="1.5097222222222222in"
    height="1.207638888888889in"}In the diagram,
    $\overrightarrow{BA}\  = \ \overrightarrow{CD}$ and
    $\overrightarrow{BA}\ \bot\ \overrightarrow{AD}$.\
    What type of special quadrilateral is ABCD? Give reasons for your
    answer.

> The opposite sides BA and CD are parallel and equal, and ∠BAD = 90°.
>
> So ABCD is a parallelogram with an interior angle of 90°, so it is a
> rectangle

6.  In the diagram, $\overrightarrow{PQ}$, $\overrightarrow{QR}$,
    $\overrightarrow{RS}$ and $\overrightarrow{SP}$ all have the same
    magnitude.

    a.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image53.png){width="1.6111111111111112in"
        height="1.2446620734908136in"}What type of special quadrilateral
        is PQRS?\
        Justify your answer.

The 4 sides are equal, so PQRS is a rhombus.

b.  What can be said about the directions of $\overrightarrow{PQ}$ and
    $\overrightarrow{RS}$?\
    Justify your answer.

The opposite sides of a rhombus are parallel, so $\overrightarrow{PQ}$
and $\overrightarrow{RS}\$have opposite directions.

7.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image54.png){width="1.5748031496062993in"
    height="1.5377493438320209in"}In the diagram, what is
    $\overrightarrow{UV}\  + \ \overrightarrow{VW}\  + \ \overrightarrow{WU}$?

$$\overset{̰}{0}$$

8.  From the diagram, write down a single vector equal to:

    a.  ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image55.png){width="1.576994750656168in"
        height="1.6719061679790026in"}$\overrightarrow{AC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}$

$$\overrightarrow{AD}$$

b.  $\overrightarrow{BC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CA}$

$$\overrightarrow{BA}$$

c.  $\overrightarrow{AD}\  - \ \overrightarrow{AB}$

$$\overrightarrow{BD}$$

d.  $\overrightarrow{(AC)}\  - \ \overrightarrow{BC}$

$$\overrightarrow{AB}$$

Development

9.  In each part, draw a diagram showing the displacement vector
    $\overrightarrow{AC}$. Then calculate the magnitude and direction of
    $\overrightarrow{AC}$. Give magnitude correct to the nearest km
    where necessary, and direction as a true bearing correct to the
    nearest degree where necessary.

+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| a.  Sarah drives 100 | b.  William walks 6  | c.  A boat sails 25  |
|     km east from A   |     km south from A  |     km east from A   |
|     to B,\           |     to B,\           |     to B,\           |
|     and then 40 km   |     and then 4 km    |     and then 15 km   |
|     west from B to   |     east from B to   |     northeast from B |
|     C.               |     C.               |     to C.            |
|                      |                      |                      |
| 60 km, 090°T         | 7 km, 146°T          | 37 km, 073°T         |
+======================+======================+======================+

10. ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image56.png){width="2.8863167104111986in"
    height="1.5003357392825898in"}ABCD is a parallelogram. Which
    statements are true?

$\overrightarrow{AB}\  = \ \overrightarrow{DC}\ \ \ \ \ |\ \ \ \ \ \overrightarrow{BC}\  = \ \overrightarrow{DA}\ \ \ \ \ |\ \ \ \ \ \overrightarrow{AD}\  = \ \overrightarrow{BC}\ \ \ \ \ |\ \overrightarrow{AC}\  = \ \overrightarrow{DB}$

$\overrightarrow{AB}\  = \ \overrightarrow{DC},\ \overrightarrow{AD}\  = \ \overrightarrow{BC}$

11. ![](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image57.png){width="4.166213910761154in"
    height="1.9210531496062992in"}On the grid of congruent
    parallelograms,
    $\overrightarrow{OA}\  = \underset{\sim}{a}\ and\ \overrightarrow{OB}\  = \underset{\sim}{b}.$

Write these vectors in terms of
$\underset{\sim}{a}\ and\ \underset{\sim}{b}.$

+-----------------------------------+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overrightarrow{OA}$         | b.  $\overrightarrow{OB}$          | c.  $\overrightarrow{OE}$          | d.  $\overrightarrow{OF}$            |
|                                   |                                    |                                    |                                      |
| $$\overset{̰}{a}$$                 | $$\overset{̰}{b}$$                  | $$2\overset{̰}{b}$$                 | $$3\overset{̰}{a}$$                   |
+===================================+====================================+====================================+======================================+
| e.  $\overrightarrow{OD}$         | f.  $\overrightarrow{OH}$          | g.  $\overrightarrow{HJ}$          | h.  $\overrightarrow{JA}$            |
|                                   |                                    |                                    |                                      |
| $$\overset{̰}{a} + \overset{̰}{b}$$ | $$\overset{̰}{a} + 2\overset{̰}{b}$$ | $$2\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b}$$ | $$- 2\overset{̰}{a} - \overset{̰}{b}$$ |
+-----------------------------------+------------------------------------+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+

Mastery

12. Prove the following. Show your steps clearly and state the laws
    used.

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.  $\overrightarrow{PQ}\  - \ \overrightarrow{RQ}\  + \ \overrightarrow{RS}\  = \ \overrightarrow{PS}$                           | b.  $\overrightarrow{AB}\  - \ \overrightarrow{CB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\  = \ \overrightarrow{AD}$                           |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{PQ}\  + \ \overrightarrow{QR}\  + \ \overrightarrow{RS}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$                           | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{BC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$                           |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{PR}\  + \ \overrightarrow{RS}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                        | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{PS}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)\ $$                                                                                | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AD}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                                                  |
+===================================================================================================================================+===================================================================================================================================+
| c.  $\overrightarrow{OM}\  - \ \overrightarrow{ON}\  + \ \overrightarrow{NM}\  = \ 2\overrightarrow{NM}$                          | d.  $\overrightarrow{PR}\  - \ \overrightarrow{QR}\  + \ \overrightarrow{QS}\  = \ \overrightarrow{PS}$                           |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{NM}\  + \ \overrightarrow{NM}\ \ \ (parallelogram\ law\ of\ subtraction)$$                                  | $$= \ \overrightarrow{PR}\  + \ \overrightarrow{RQ}\  + \ \overrightarrow{QS}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$                           |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ 2\overrightarrow{NM}$$                                                                                                      | $$= \ \overrightarrow{PQ}\  + \ \overrightarrow{QS}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                   | $$= \ \overrightarrow{PS}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| e.  $\overrightarrow{EG}\  - \ \overrightarrow{EF}\  - \ \overrightarrow{GF}\  = \ 2\overrightarrow{FG}$                          | f.  $\overrightarrow{PT}\  - \ \overrightarrow{PR}\  - \ \overrightarrow{TR}\  = \ 2\overrightarrow{RT}$                          |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{FG}\  - \ \overrightarrow{GF}\ \ \ (parallelogram\ law\ of\ subtraction)$$                                  | $$= \ \overrightarrow{RT}\  - \ \overrightarrow{TR}\ \ \ (parallelogram\ law\ of\ subtraction)$$                                  |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{FG}\  + \ \overrightarrow{FG}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$                                                     | $$= \ \overrightarrow{RT}\  + \ \overrightarrow{RT}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ 2\overrightarrow{FG}$$                                                                                                      | $$= \ 2\overrightarrow{RT}$$                                                                                                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| g.  $\overrightarrow{MN}\  - \ \overrightarrow{PN}\  + \ \overrightarrow{LM}\  = \ \overrightarrow{LP}$                           | h.  $\overrightarrow{AB}\  - \ \overrightarrow{CB}\  - \ \overrightarrow{DC}\  - \ \overrightarrow{ED}\  = \ \overrightarrow{AE}$ |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{MN}\  + \ \overrightarrow{NP}\  + \ \overrightarrow{LM}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$                           | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{BC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DE}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$ |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{LM}\  + \ \overrightarrow{MN}\  + \ \overrightarrow{NP}\ \ \ (commutative\ law)$$                           | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DE}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                              |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{LN}\  + \ \overrightarrow{NP}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                        | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DE}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{LP}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                                                  | $$= \ \overrightarrow{AE}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| i.  $\overrightarrow{BC}\  - \ \overrightarrow{BA}\  - \ \overrightarrow{DC}\  - \ \overrightarrow{AD}\  = \ \overset{̰}{0}$       | j.  $- \overrightarrow{XZ} + \ \overrightarrow{XY}\  + \ \overrightarrow{ZY}\  = \ 2\overrightarrow{ZY}$                          |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{BC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{AB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DA}\ \ \ (negative\ vector)$$ | $$= \ \overrightarrow{XY}\  - \ \overrightarrow{XZ}\  + \ \overrightarrow{ZY}\ \ \ (commutative\ law)$$                           |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{AB}\  + \ \overrightarrow{BC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DA}\ \ \ (commutative\ law)$$ | $$= \ \overrightarrow{ZY}\  + \ \overrightarrow{ZY}\ \ \ (parallelogram\ law\ of\ subtraction)$$                                  |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{AC}\  + \ \overrightarrow{CD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DA}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                              | $$= \ 2\overrightarrow{ZY}$$                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overrightarrow{AD}\  + \ \overrightarrow{DA}\ \ \ (triangle\ law)$$                                                        |                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                   |
| $$= \ \overset{̰}{0}\ \ \ (zero\ vector)$$                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                   |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

# Position Vectors

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Position Vectors**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+============================================================================================================================================+============================================================================================================================================+
| Two vectors with the same magnitude and direction are equal, regardless of starting point.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| To simplify calculations, we can move the vector so that its tail is at the origin.\                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| This creates a **position vector**.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **"Free" Vectors**                                                                                                                         | ![A diagram of a graph AI-generated content may be                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                            | incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image59.png){width="2.4508661417322837in" |
| ![A group of arrows pointing to different colors AI-generated content may be                                                               | height="2.4463549868766403in"}**Position Vectors**                                                                                         |
| incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image58.png){width="2.3229166666666665in" |                                                                                                                                            |
| height="1.8291666666666666in"}                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Identify** position vectors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

| Identify which of the following are position vectors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a.                                                                                                                                         | b.                                                                                                                                         | c.                                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                            |
| ![A graph of a line with a blue arrow AI-generated content may be                                                                          | ![A graph of a graph of x and y AI-generated content may be                                                                                | ![A graph of a line with a blue arrow AI-generated content may be                                                                          |
| incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image60.png){width="2.2354166666666666in" | incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image61.png){width="2.2256944444444446in" | incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image62.png){width="2.1962095363079617in" |
| height="2.165277777777778in"}                                                                                                              | height="2.151388888888889in"}                                                                                                              | height="2.165277777777778in"}                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| d.                                                                                                                                         | e.                                                                                                                                         | f.                                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                            |
| ![A graph of a function AI-generated content may be                                                                                        | ![A blue line with a cross pointing to the x AI-generated content may be                                                                   | ![A graph of x and y with a blue arrow pointing to the center AI-generated content may be                                                  |
| incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image63.png){width="2.1875in"             | incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image64.png){width="2.1875in"             | incorrect.](media/Introduction to Vectors 1_Vector Representation, notation and operations/media/image65.png){width="2.14375in"            |
| height="2.165277777777778in"}                                                                                                              | height="2.107638888888889in"}                                                                                                              | height="2.107638888888889in"}                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| - **Position Vectors**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| $\overrightarrow{\mathbf{OP}}$ is the position vector with **tail at the origin** and **tip at a point** $\mathbf{P}\left( \mathbf{x,y} \right).$                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
